value: Used to improve the machining quality of copper and stainless steel products and to color glass and ceramics. Also in thermoelectric devices. Some is used in the rubber industry and it is a basic ingredient in manufacturing blasting caps.
notes: Dato secundario; el precio y los indicadores económicos requieren fecha y mercado para uso profesional.
